title: cyphostemma dehongense
intro: Cyphostemma dehongense, also known as the "Chinese milk vine," is a type of flowering plant in the grape family (Vitaceae). This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Cyphostemma dehongense include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially inhibiting the growth of certain cancer cells. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
